hero.title: Hi!, I'm Marco Agüero
hero.role: Full Stack Developer specializing in web applications and process automation
hero.description: I develop modern applications and intelligent automations that help companies optimize operations, reduce manual work, and improve their internal processes.

about.title: What I do
about.description: I specialize in web application development and business process automation. My approach is to build useful, fast, and easy-to-maintain solutions.

card1.title: Full Stack Developer
card1.description:
I develop modern web applications using technologies such as Next.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL.
I work on administrative systems, dashboards, internal platforms, APIs, and applications focused on performance, scalability, and a good user experience.

card2.title: Process Automation
card2.description:
I also develop automations that help reduce repetitive tasks and improve operational workflows.
I have worked on solutions for document processing, data synchronization, administrative task automation, and system integration.

technologies.title: Technologies
technologies.intro: These are some of the technologies I work with regularly.
technologies.mainStackDescription: My main stack is focused on modern web development and process automation.
technologies.otherDescription: I also have experience working with complementary tools and technologies for deployment, automation, and service integration.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have a project in mind or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out.
contact.formSuccess: Message sent successfully. Thanks for reaching out.
contact.formError: An error occurred while sending the message. Please try again.
